items.title: They Hired Me to Steal a Shopping Cart Full of Human DNA 🧬 Darknet Diaries Ep. 160: Greg
items.author: Jack Rhysider
items.content:
<article>Greg Linares (AKA Laughing Mantis) shares his hunts for Zero Day exploits, the triple(?) agent working at Microsoft, how he became the youngest hacker ever arrested in Arizona, and that time a client hired him to steal human DNA.

Follow Greg on Twitter: https://x.com/Laughing_Mantis.

Visit https://darknetdiaries.com/episode/160 for a list of sources, full transcripts, and to listen to all episodes.</article>
